name: Dramatic Snake-Eye Chase
name_jp: スネークアイ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>追</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>走</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>劇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Place 1 "Diabellstar" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. During the End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell you control; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Dramatic Snake-Eye Chase" once per turn.
eff: Place 1 "Diabellstar" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY face-up in its owner's Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell. During the End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Monster Card treated as a Continuous Spell you control; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Dramatic Snake-Eye Chase" once per turn.

action: Places cards from hand in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Graveyard in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
